data.name: 艾梅莉亞與色色觸手迷宮
data.detailed_description:
【概要】

這是一款在探索迷宮的過程中，主角艾梅莉亞會遭遇各種猥褻情境的Roguelike RPG。

遊戲中設有迷宮和城鎮兩個場景，在迷宮中主要是觸手和色色陷阱，城鎮中則有人類的訓練等著艾梅莉亞的到來。

讓這位堅強高傲的魔女——艾梅莉亞，在面對觸手和人類的訓練下，墮落到快感之中吧！

玩家可以自由選擇如何改變她的狀態，而根據遊玩的方式，也可能達成處女結局！

【劇情簡介】

在繁榮的聖都克雷桑德，由於派遣去調查附近迷宮的隊伍無一生還，因此最近關於該迷宮的謠言傳得沸沸揚揚。

在這樣的情況下，知名冒險者之一的艾梅莉亞接到了調查那個奇妙迷宮的委託。

本以為這次的委託也能輕鬆完成，但在過程中艾梅莉亞卻不幸被奇怪的觸手寄生。

甚至被寄生後的艾梅莉亞變得極其虛弱，究竟她能否順利完成這次的任務呢？

【登場角色】

※艾梅莉亞（Amelia）

冷靜果斷的魔女冒險者，擅長遠距魔法與戰略判斷。

本作唯一會出現在H事件中的角色，其角色狀態與成長路線，皆由玩家的選擇決定。

【Roguelike迷宮】

本作迷宮採用 Roguelike 隨機生成系統，每次挑戰都會出現不同的路線、陷阱與敵人配置。

  • 利用遠程魔法或道具應對突發狀況。

  • 根據艾梅莉亞當前的角色狀態，將可能觸發特殊演出或戰鬥反應。

  • 陷阱事件可選擇躲避或迎戰，觸發條件與內容皆由玩家掌控。

  • 解鎖獨特的角色狀態後，探索過程將展現更豐富的互動與劇情演出。

【城鎮與系統】

在城鎮中，玩家可進行：

  • 購買強力法杖與道具。

  • 承接打工任務，提升能力或獲得金錢。

  • 體驗特殊裝扮事件（女僕裝、舞者、兔女郎、比基尼等）。

  • 觀察艾梅莉亞在不同穿著或名聲狀態下，與周遭角色的互動變化。

隨著玩家的選擇讓艾梅莉亞的角色路線演進，城鎮中的事件也會出現變化，提供更豐富的探索體驗。

【H內容說明】

  • 根據理性和寄生率不同，結局也會分歧！

    主要有五條路線可供選擇！

*遊戲內部皆為無碼版本*

data.short_description: 地下城調查小組沒有任何一人回來，超強大的魔法師艾梅莉亞因此被委託前去調查... 雖然順利回來了，卻也被奇怪的觸手寄生！？ 夾在色色觸手與街道的黑暗誘惑之間的寄生秀就此展開！
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-7100 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200 or above
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: N/A
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Amelia and the Erotic Tentacle Trap Dungeon
data.detailed_description:
Overview

Assist the proud sorceress Amelia as she explores the dungeon and encounters all sorts of lewd events in this Roguelike RPG!

Shuttle between the damp, dark, tentacle-filled dungeons and the nearby town, with all sorts of perverted surprises in store for our busty mage.

Whether it's from tentacled monsters or regular ol' horny humans, naughty perils await the haughty Amelia!

Let her fall into depravity through the tentacles and humans' training... Or maintain her chastity 'till the very end. You decide what happens to Amelia!

Story

In the holy city Crescent, rumors are afoot about a deadly labyrinthine dungeon after none of the scouting parties were ever heard from again.

Amelia, renown sorceress and adventurer also received a request to explore that mysterious dungeon.

The proud sorceress unfortunately misjudged the dungeon and became parasitized by one of its tentacle creatures.

The parasite has already begun to slowly weaken her powers. Will she be able to complete her mission?

Characters

※Amelia

A calm and decisive witch, skilled in ranged magic and strategic thinking.

She is the only character who appears in H-scenes. All of her character states and progression paths are determined by player choice.

Roguelike Dungeon

The dungeon features roguelike random generation, offering new layouts, traps, and enemies with each run.

  • Use ranged magic and items to handle any surprises.

  • Special effects or battle responses may trigger based on Amelia's current character state.

  • Trap events can be avoided or confronted—the player controls all trigger conditions.

  • Unlocking unique character states reveals richer interactions and story moments during exploration.

Town & Systems

In town, players can:

  • Buy powerful staves and items.

  • Take on part-time jobs to boost stats or earn money.

  • Trigger special events based on costumes (maid, dancer, bunny girl, bikini, etc.).

  • Observe how NPC reactions change based on her outfit or reputation.

As Amelia's character path evolves through your choices, new town events will unfold, enhancing the adventure.

H Content

  • Experience different endings based on your mental state and parasite levels!

    Make your choices and play through five main story routes!

*All in-game content is uncensored.*

data.short_description: The proud sorceress Amelia has been parasitized by a tentacle creature! Help her explore a treacherous dungeon, caught between lewd tentacles and the town's dark temptations in this naughty roguelike RPG!
data.supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-7100 or AMD Ryzen 3 1200 or above
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: N/A
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
